title: BlockTips
description: Shows useful tooltips above blocks you're looking at.
body:
# BlockTips

Shows tooltips above the block you're looking at containing information about the block.

## Installation

Download the [data pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blocktips) from Modrinth and place it in the `datapacks` folder in your Minecraft world directory.

Download the [resource pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blocktips) from Modrinth and place it in the `resourcepacks` folder in your Minecraft directory.

## Supported blocks (yet)

✅ Lectern  
✅ Spawner  
✅ Jukebox  
✅ Beacon  
✅ Beehive  
✅ Bee Nest  
✅ Note Block  

## Issues & Ideas

If you found a bug while using the pack or have an idea for additional block data to be shown or an other feature, you can [open an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/foxeddev/blocktips/issues).
